channel.title: More on RIZKY
channel.description: Recent content in More on RIZKY

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hello, I am Rizky Kurniawan, student of Informatics Engineering at the Islamic University of Kalimantan, Banjarmasin, South Kalimantan. I come from “Subur Indah” Village, Katingan Kuala District, Katingan Regency, Central Kalimantan, and currently live in Semangat Dalam, Alalak District, Barito Kuala Regency, South Kalimantan.

item.title: Codelabs
item.description: Codelabs provide a guided, tutorial, hands-on coding experience. Codelabs will step you through the process of building an example application.
